content:
# elizaos/eliza Daily Update (Jun 26, 2026)

## OVERVIEW 
Development on June 26, 2026, focused heavily on transitioning the framework to Gemma-based model tiers, hardening the desktop/web shell, and executing a major build system audit. Significant progress was made in standardizing training pipelines, improving cloud deployment reliability, and consolidating plugin build configurations to reduce technical debt.

## KEY TECHNICAL DEVELOPMENTS

**Gemma Model Transition & Training Standardization**
*   Completed a comprehensive migration of training scripts, benchmarks, and mobile fixtures from legacy Qwen-based tiers to the active Gemma-backed Eliza-1 tiers ([#9825](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/9825), [#9805](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/9805), [#9804](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/9804), [#9803](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/9803), [#9796](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/9796), [#9787](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/9787)).
*   Updated documentation and quantization tools to reflect the new 2B-27B Gemma range, ensuring consistency across local inference and cloud training environments ([#9798](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/9798), [#9792](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/9792), [#9767](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/9767)).

**Build System Consolidation & Infrastructure Hardening**
*   Initiated a major consolidation of plugin `build.ts` files into a shared driver to eliminate redundant configurations ([#9826](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/9826), [#9828](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/9828)).
*   Improved CI/CD reliability by optimizing Turbo cache usage, cleaning up drift in build dependencies, and moving trusted CodeQL runs to dedicated robot runners ([#9824](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/9824), [#9821](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/9821), [#9815](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/9815)).

**Agent Framework & Cloud Enhancements**
*   Wired permission-aware access-context filters into chat retrieval paths and hardened desktop shell view switching ([#9752](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/9752), [#9725](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/9725)).
*   Resolved critical cloud deployment issues, including sign-in redirects and silent failures in pipelines, while opening apps-deploy to all organizations in production ([#9813](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/9813), [#9774](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/9774), [#9789](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/9789)).

## NEWLY OPENED PULL REQUESTS
*   [#9812](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/9812): fix(cloud-ui): drop useless row copy + optimistic delete on api keys page.
*   [#9806](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/9806): ci: avoid stale cancelled aggregate failures.
*   [#9802](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/9802): ci: avoid stale cancelled aggregate failures.
*   [#9780](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/9780): fix(core): wrap over-long line in findWebLookupActionNames.

## CLOSED ISSUES
*   *No specific issues were closed via the issue tracker today; all development activity was tracked via Pull Requests.*

## NEW ISSUES
*   *No new issues were opened today.*

## ACTIVE ISSUES
*   *No active issues with more than 3 comments were reported for this date.*
